log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Githzerai — Bardic Musician HP: 25/67
--- Githzerai — Bardic Musician --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
